ddls:
CREATE TABLE "district_representatives" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the representative */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the political party */,
  "cpvi" TEXT /* Cook Partisan Voting Index indicating district political leanings */,
  "incumbent_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the incumbent started their term */,
  "incumbent_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the incumbent's term ends or 'present' if currently serving */,
  "district_map" TEXT /* Path or URL to the district map (if available) */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the district is currently active */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election */,
  "next_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the next election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the representative */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the representative */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the representative */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the representative */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the representative */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the representative */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "party_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure history record */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the representative */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the district */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the tenure started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the tenure ended or 'present' if currently serving */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, official, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)
